customer.welcome:
Welcome to Sevagan! 🙏
How can we help you today?

Type HELP to see what we can do.
customer.invalid_service: Please select a service from the list.
customer.ask_location:
Please share your location or type your area name.
(e.g., Virudhunagar, Sattur Road)
customer.select_time_slot: When do you need this service? Please select a time slot:
customer.invalid_time_slot: Please select a time slot from the list.
customer.technician_on_way:
🚗 {{technicianName}} is on the way to your location!

Job: {{jobNumber}}
customer.amount_confirmed: ✅ Amount confirmed. Thank you for using Sevagan!
customer.rating_received:
🙏 Thank you for rating {{technicianName}} — {{rating}} ⭐

Your feedback helps us maintain quality.

Job {{jobNumber}} is now complete. Have a great day!
customer.job_cancelled:
❌ Job {{jobNumber}} has been cancelled.

If you need service in future, just message us. We are here 24/7!
customer.help:
📱 Sevagan Help

To book a service, just describe what you need!
Example: "I need an electrician"

Commands:
• TRACK JOB123 — Check job status
• CANCEL JOB123 — Cancel a job
• HELP — Show this message

We serve Virudhunagar district.
Working hours: 7 AM – 9 PM
customer.unknown_command:
Sorry, I did not understand that. 🙏

Type HELP to see available commands, or simply describe the service you need.
customer.no_technician_available: 🔍 We are working on finding the right technician for your request. Our team will connect you shortly. We apologize for the wait!
customer.invoice_sent: 📄 Your invoice {{invoiceNumber}} has been sent. Thank you for using Sevagan Homeservices!

technician.job_rejected:
❌ Job {{jobNumber}} rejected. We will assign another technician.

You will receive the next available job shortly.
technician.job_started: 🔨 Job {{jobNumber}} started. Good luck! When work is complete, let us know.
technician.ask_completion_amount: Please enter the amount received (numbers only):
technician.customer_confirmed:
✅ Customer confirmed the amount. Payment verified!

Job {{jobNumber}} is fully complete.
technician.help:
📱 Sevagan Technician Help

When you get a job offer or accept a job, just tap one of the options shown.

Other commands:
• STATUS — Check your active job status
• JOBS — View recent job history
• HELP — Show this message

For support: Contact your area manager.
technician.unknown_command:
Sorry, I did not understand that. 🙏

Type HELP to see available commands.
technician.no_active_job:
ℹ️ You have no active job at the moment.

You will be notified when a new job is available.
technician.offer_expired:
⏰ The job offer has expired.

We will assign the job to another available technician. You will receive the next job shortly.
technician.photo_received: 📸 Photo received and saved for Job {{jobNumber}}. Thank you!
technician.status_awaiting_confirmation:
⏳ Waiting for customer to confirm amount for Job {{jobNumber}}.

Amount: ₹{{amount}} ({{paymentMode}})

faq.hours:
🕐 We operate 7 AM to 9 PM, Monday to Sunday.

For emergencies, please describe your issue and we will try our best to help.
faq.pricing:
💰 Pricing depends on the service type and scope of work. Please create a service request and the technician will provide an estimate on-site.

We believe in transparent pricing with no hidden charges.
faq.coverage:
📍 We currently serve Virudhunagar and surrounding areas including Sattur, Aruppukottai, Sivakasi, and Rajapalayam.

More cities coming soon!
